posts.text: It certainly is holding state in the book, but the theory of mind is a property of the system. The book doesn't even know what page it's open to. It being open to a given page is a state of the system as a whole. The system carries the TM, not the book alone. QED.

reply_context.text: Consider pre-download-all-the-things gaming. I have a game on a CD, but it's useless until I put it in my playstation.
